title: Mc122477Fix
description: A simple mod that fixes MC-122477, the random extra chat character on Unix-based systems
body:
Fix double-typing 't' or '/' issue on some OSes when opening the chat window.

You do not need to install this mod if you didn't encounter this problem.

Client side only. Forge / Fabric required.

Mojang issue tracker https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-122477.
